name: Tempo
description: Distributed tracing backend. Receives trace spans from the platform via gRPC and stores them in Grafana Tempo.
longDescription:
Deploys a gRPC wrapper alongside a Tempo container. The platform forwards trace spans via IngestSpan gRPC calls; the wrapper writes them to Tempo using the Zipkin push API.

Exposes a TraceQL-compatible query endpoint at http://tempo:3200 for Grafana and other visualizers.
author: Kleff

config.label: Tempo Zipkin URL
config.description: Override to use an external Tempo instance (Zipkin endpoint). Leave blank to use the bundled companion.
